subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the SS Celtic at sea, 1912-12-05
subcodes.first_line: Come and see what a brilliant star this is!  I cherish the hope that the loved ones of the Blessed Beauty may be like this shining star
subcodes.first_line_orig: بیائید ببینید چه ستارهٴ  روشنی است من میخواهم احبای جمال مبارک مثل این ستاره روشن باشند
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance
